Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

We invite you to contact one of our sales representatives today at 1-877-584-3600 to learn more about our services.", "founded_year": 1995, "type": "PRIVATELY_HELD", "industry": "financial services", "staff": {"total": 60, "range": {"start": 51, "end": 200}}, "logo": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D0BAQEST004zW0KFg/company-logo_400_400/company-logo_400_400/0/1695998445082/corporate_billing_llc_logo?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=SawpLctyaWyZwn0yuDa9jV5CRgtkKvW7gGJj4sp383A"}}, "link": {"website": "http://www.corpbill.com", "domain": "corpbill.com", "domain_ltd": "corpbill.com", "linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/company/corporate-billing"}, "financial": {"revenue": {"annual": {"start": 1000000, "end": 5000000, "amount": "1000000-5000000"}}}, "location": {"headquarter": {"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}, "locations": [{"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}]}, "industries": ["financial services"], "keywords": ["factoring", "accounts receivable", "credit", "collections", "receivables finance", "working capital", "finance", "business loans", "transportation", "trucking", "auto dealer", "truck dealer", "parts", "repair", "recycling"], "hashtags": ["transportation", "factoring", "fleetmaintenance"], "languages": ["english"], "naics": ["541511", "541219", "541618"], "last_updated": "2026-05-07"}

{"first_name": "Christopher", "last_name": "Forsberg", "full_name": "Christopher Forsberg", "headline": "VP - Operations @ Big Think Capital", "title": "Vice President Operations", "picture": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E03AQFe6crMTYjNJQ/profile-displayphoto-crop_800_800/B4EZijllU0GYAI-/0/1755091195597?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=UWxcy49lQMaPd1jznkawqbN6t-m398kIu7gL2zOva2w"}, "background": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E16AQGR-_7nexX3NA/profile-displaybackgroundimage-shrink_350_1400/B4EZ0HQX4nHUAY-/0/1773943226349?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=zOJfanYgDdwqKZecTl2EnPcP65ixEhsUVla5FVjmRF0"}, "birth_date": null, "summary": "What is Big Think Capital?

Big Think Capital is a full financial services provider that provides business owners, who are looking to grow, with several opportunities of working capital depending on their goals and objectives.
For many business owners there are so many important tasks vying for their attention, that they're never are able to find the time to make sure they have the right funding partner by their side. Owners are often bombarded by different lenders who do not give the customized planning and options that we at Big Think Capital do.

Our entire team will put together a customized funding plan for you based on your business goals. Some business owners are not sure exactly what they need, but we here at Big Think Capital will not only provide you with multiple options, but also offer a consultative approach on how to achieve the highest degree of financial success.

So, would YOU like to have a proven capital provider like Big Think Capital as a resource for you and your business going forward?

If so, send me a message and let's chat. I'll point you in the right direction."}

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

We invite you to contact one of our sales representatives today at 1-877-584-3600 to learn more about our services.", "founded_year": 1995, "type": "PRIVATELY_HELD", "industry": "financial services", "staff": {"total": 60, "range": {"start": 51, "end": 200}}, "logo": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D0BAQEST004zW0KFg/company-logo_400_400/company-logo_400_400/0/1695998445082/corporate_billing_llc_logo?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=SawpLctyaWyZwn0yuDa9jV5CRgtkKvW7gGJj4sp383A"}}, "link": {"website": "http://www.corpbill.com", "domain": "corpbill.com", "domain_ltd": "corpbill.com", "linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/company/corporate-billing"}, "financial": {"revenue": {"annual": {"start": 1000000, "end": 5000000, "amount": "1000000-5000000"}}}, "location": {"headquarter": {"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}, "locations": [{"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}]}, "industries": ["financial services"], "keywords": ["factoring", "accounts receivable", "credit", "collections", "receivables finance", "working capital", "finance", "business loans", "transportation", "trucking", "auto dealer", "truck dealer", "parts", "repair", "recycling"], "hashtags": ["transportation", "factoring", "fleetmaintenance"], "languages": ["english"], "naics": ["541511", "541219", "541618"], "last_updated": "2026-05-07"}

company:
{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

We invite you to contact one of our sales representatives today at 1-877-584-3600 to learn more about our services.", "founded_year": 1995, "type": "PRIVATELY_HELD", "industry": "financial services", "staff": {"total": 60, "range": {"start": 51, "end": 200}}, "logo": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D0BAQEST004zW0KFg/company-logo_400_400/company-logo_400_400/0/1695998445082/corporate_billing_llc_logo?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=SawpLctyaWyZwn0yuDa9jV5CRgtkKvW7gGJj4sp383A"}}, "link": {"website": "http://www.corpbill.com", "domain": "corpbill.com", "domain_ltd": "corpbill.com", "linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/company/corporate-billing"}, "financial": {"revenue": {"annual": {"start": 1000000, "end": 5000000, "amount": "1000000-5000000"}}}, "location": {"headquarter": {"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}, "locations": [{"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}]}, "industries": ["financial services"], "keywords": ["factoring", "accounts receivable", "credit", "collections", "receivables finance", "working capital", "finance", "business loans", "transportation", "trucking", "auto dealer", "truck dealer", "parts", "repair", "recycling"], "hashtags": ["transportation", "factoring", "fleetmaintenance"], "languages": ["english"], "naics": ["541511", "541219", "541618"], "last_updated": "2026-05-07"}

profile: {"first_name": "David", "last_name": "Gomez", "full_name": "David Gomez", "headline": "Chief Financial Officer | C-Level, MBA, Master in Finance", "title": "Chief Financial Officer", "picture": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E03AQE7hink4UeT_A/profile-displayphoto-shrink_800_800/profile-displayphoto-shrink_800_800/0/1707170231072?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=YAkqe_9vxqrw9FEfeQokALrz_iiJsr-WJahStVSR9T8"}, "background": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E16AQGGfkS0vLNXaw/profile-displaybackgroundimage-shrink_350_1400/profile-displaybackgroundimage-shrink_350_1400/0/1726688379719?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=2NcHm1eIQ5zaL8OMTnWj-VRZu7WmMgrxQWh7gYQc-cY"}, "birth_date": null, "summary": "As Chief Financial Officer of Summar Financial, a company that provides credit solutions for small and medium enterprises, I oversee treasury, accounting, controlling, administration, and human resources. I also handle market analysis, evaluating market dynamics, competition, and emerging trends, as well as financial reporting in COLGAAP, IFRS, and USGAAP, the funding structure, and relationships with banks and investors.\n\nI have a strong background in finance, with an MBA from EGADE Business School at Tecnológico de Monterrey and a Master of Finance from Universidad de Los Andes. I also hold a Bachelor of Science in Systems Engineering from Universidad ICESI, which fuels my passion for technology and innovation. I have advanced skills in Oracle E-Business Suite ERP and MS-Office, and I have completed certification courses in Risk Management. I am trilingual in French, English, and Spanish, and I thrive in multicultural and dynamic environments. My mission is to leverage my administrative and financial expertise and leadership skills to support growth and sustainability."}

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

{"id": "b4b66c22-891f-f744-008f-8a2bcae5b2ff", "summary": {"name": "Commercial Funding Inc.", "legal_name": "Commercial Funding Inc.", "description": "Commercial Funding Inc. is a full-service accounts receivable financing company that provides funding solutions for small to mid-sized companies across the United States. We have expertise in a number of key industries that can easily benefit from A/R financing: transportation, oil and gas, construction, commercial waste disposal, staffing, and more. Our goal is to help your business succeed and grow by getting you the funding you need—and faster than if you simply invoiced your customers and waited for payment. After all, it’s your money, and we help you get it smarter and faster.

Why Do Business With Us?
Our people set us apart. Each client is assigned a personal account manager to help you. In addition to assisting you in the onboarding process, your account manager is there to answer questions and help your business succeed and grow. Our personal approach and attentive staff keep our customers coming back; in fact, we are happy to boast an industry-leading client retention rate. Our personal service combined with our industry expertise, extensive database, and knowledge of the invoice factoring business, ensure that you have the money you need, when you need it.

Company History
Originally founded as Transfac Capital, we focused mainly on the transportation and trucking industry. Over the years, Transfac Capital’s expertise expanded into other markets. Even so, the focus has always been on you, the client.
In 2017 our business was acquired by Commercial Credit, Inc., providing us with the financial backing of a much larger organization, which in turn gave us the opportunity to enhance our capabilities and expand our service offerings. Additionally, it allows us to offer equipment financing through our sister company, Commercial Credit Group Inc. (CCG). 

In June of 2018, we became known as Commercial Funding Inc. to better reflect our broad product offerings and multi-industry experience.", "seo": "Commercial Funding Inc. is a leading AR financing company that will help you gain quick access to cash in exchange for your invoices. company:
{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

We invite you to contact one of our sales representatives today at 1-877-584-3600 to learn more about our services.", "founded_year": 1995, "type": "PRIVATELY_HELD", "industry": "financial services", "staff": {"total": 60, "range": {"start": 51, "end": 200}}, "logo": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D0BAQEST004zW0KFg/company-logo_400_400/company-logo_400_400/0/1695998445082/corporate_billing_llc_logo?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=SawpLctyaWyZwn0yuDa9jV5CRgtkKvW7gGJj4sp383A"}}, "link": {"website": "http://www.corpbill.com", "domain": "corpbill.com", "domain_ltd": "corpbill.com", "linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/company/corporate-billing"}, "financial": {"revenue": {"annual": {"start": 1000000, "end": 5000000, "amount": "1000000-5000000"}}}, "location": {"headquarter": {"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}, "locations": [{"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}]}, "industries": ["financial services"], "keywords": ["factoring", "accounts receivable", "credit", "collections", "receivables finance", "working capital", "finance", "business loans", "transportation", "trucking", "auto dealer", "truck dealer", "parts", "repair", "recycling"], "hashtags": ["transportation", "factoring", "fleetmaintenance"], "languages": ["english"], "naics": ["541511", "541219", "541618"], "last_updated": "2026-05-07"}

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

We invite you to contact one of our sales representatives today at 1-877-584-3600 to learn more about our services.", "founded_year": 1995, "type": "PRIVATELY_HELD", "industry": "financial services", "staff": {"total": 60, "range": {"start": 51, "end": 200}}, "logo": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D0BAQEST004zW0KFg/company-logo_400_400/company-logo_400_400/0/1695998445082/corporate_billing_llc_logo?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=SawpLctyaWyZwn0yuDa9jV5CRgtkKvW7gGJj4sp383A"}}, "link": {"website": "http://www.corpbill.com", "domain": "corpbill.com", "domain_ltd": "corpbill.com", "linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/company/corporate-billing"}, "financial": {"revenue": {"annual": {"start": 1000000, "end": 5000000, "amount": "1000000-5000000"}}}, "location": {"headquarter": {"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}, "locations": [{"continent": "North America", "country": "United States", "state": "Alabama", "city": "Decatur", "street": "239 Johnston St SE", "postal_code": "35601", "raw_address": "239 Johnston St SE, Decatur, Alabama, United States, North America", "position": {"lng": -86.59986, "lat": 34.708153}}]}, "industries": ["financial services"], "keywords": ["factoring", "accounts receivable", "credit", "collections", "receivables finance", "working capital", "finance", "business loans", "transportation", "trucking", "auto dealer", "truck dealer", "parts", "repair", "recycling"], "hashtags": ["transportation", "factoring", "fleetmaintenance"], "languages": ["english"], "naics": ["541511", "541219", "541618"], "last_updated": "2026-05-07"}

{"id": "c1c96c72-d7f0-a7b8-d578-ec529c8f5159", "summary": {"name": "Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "description": "Corporate Billing is a factoring company which started in 1995 with the purpose of providing companies the ability to leverage commercial accounts receivable to meet current cash flow needs.

We fill the void between traditional banking and equity financing by advancing funds for your invoices daily, which turns your accounts receivable into instant cash.

Corporate Billing has been serving clients in various industries including automotive dealers, truck dealers, repair shops, transportation, aftermarket parts, original equipment parts, equipment dealers, auto paint and supply, recycled parts, telecommunications and manufacturing since 1995.

In addition, Corporate Billing provides credit and collection services as well as on-line, real-time reporting.

Corporate Billing is also a proud member of the International Factoring Association (IFA).

Corporate Billing’s cbCharge provides free credit to fleets while paying repair, parts and tire centers quickly.  cbCharge removes all credit risk, billing, collections from the repair shop.  cbCharge is a preferred vendor for NAPA AutoCare, NAPA Truck Service, NAPA Collision Centers, NAPA AUTOPRO, Jasper Engines and Transmissions, Fleet Services International, HDA Truck Pride, PTP shops and many more industry groups. www.cbCharge.com.

Our highly qualified and experienced staff is committed to providing you with excellent customer service, same-day funding, and no-hidden fee products.

Corporate Billing is a division of SouthState Bank, N.A. which is a public traded bank under the stock symbol SSB.

{"first_name": "Brad", "last_name": "Agee", "full_name": "Brad Agee", "headline": "Vice President | Sales Representative at Corporate Billing - A Division of SouthState Bank", "title": "Vice President, Sales Representative", "picture": {"source": "https://images.ai-ark.com/YF5qrPiKiA33dX1nWEag4Q7D38hao993-XoawBX5xkM/exp:1780358399/rs:fill:80:80/plain/s3://ark-person/images/546522bf-5a39-b549-5d1b-5ac645991710.jpg"}, "background": null, "birth_date": null, "summary": "With more than 20 years of experience in commercial banking and specialty finance, I specialize in helping growth-oriented businesses access structured working capital solutions that support expansion, operational stability, and long-term success.

Throughout my career, I have built and managed complex commercial portfolios across Houston, San Antonio, Dallas, and Fort Worth, partnering with middle-market and emerging growth companies to deliver customized credit solutions. My background spans business banking, commercial lending, and accounts receivable financing, with a strong foundation in credit analysis, risk management, and relationship-based sales leadership.

Today, I serve as Vice President and Sales Representative for Corporate Billing, a division of SouthState Bank, leading business development across Texas and Colorado. I work closely with business owners, CFOs, CPAs, and banking partners to deliver flexible accounts receivable financing solutions that adapt as companies grow.

I hold a BBA in Business with a minor in Finance from Sam Houston State University."}
